mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TB_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userid}
limit 100

SELECT DECODE(A.USE_YN, 'N', 0, 1) ISPORTAL FROM TB_ORG_CD A, TB_USER B WHERE A.ORG_CD = B.ORG_CD AND B.USER_ID = #{userid}
limit 100

SELECT A.USER_ID AS USERID , A.OLD_USER_ID AS OLD_USERID , A.RES_NO_PREFIX||'******' AS RESNO , A.USER_NM AS NAME , FN_MASKING_NAME(A.USER_NM) AS MASKING_NAME , A.EMAIL_ID AS EMAIL , C.PWD AS PWD , B.COMP_CD AS COMP , C.HOMETEL AS HOMETEL , C.LGFAIL AS LGFAIL , A.MPHONE_NO AS HANDPHONE , C.LGIP AS LGIP , (SELECT DECODE(NVL(MIN(ADM.GADMIN), 'N'), 'N', 'N', 'A201', 'O', 'M1', 'O', 'T1', 'O', 'A1', 'Y', 'A2', 'Y', 'P') FROM TZ_MANAGER ADM , TZ_GADMIN ROL WHERE ADM.USERID = C.USERID AND ADM.ISDELETED = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ADM.FMON AND ADM.TMON AND ROL.GADMIN = ADM.GADMIN ) AS GUBUN , CASE WHEN A.USER_STS_CD = 'D' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ISRETIRE , C.RETIRE_DATE AS RETIRE_DATE , (SELECT CODENM FROM TZ_CODE X WHERE X.CODE = C.RETIRE_TYPE AND X.GUBUN = '0069') AS RETIRE_TYPE , C.RETIRE_REASON AS RETIRE_REASON , A.JOB_CD AS JOB_CD , (SELECT JOB_NM FROM TB_JOB_CD X WHERE X.JOB_CD = A.JOB_CD) AS JOB_NM , NVL(C.BON_ADM,'N') AS BON_ADM , C.HQ_ORG_CD AS HQ_ORG_CD , C.EMP_GUBUN AS EMP_GUBUN , C.AGENCY_CD AS AGENCY_CD , CASE WHEN B.ORG_FULL_NM LIKE '%영업%' OR A.LVL_NM LIKE '%지사장%' THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END AS MADAN_CHK , CASE WHEN A.LVL_NM LIKE '%팀장%' THEN 'Y' WHEN A.LVL_NM LIKE '%지사장%' THEN 'J' ELSE '' END AS MADAN_ADMIN , NVL(C.GYUNGRYUK,'N') AS GYUNGRYUK , NVL(C.HRDC,'N') AS HRDC , (SELECT X.GRCD FROM TZ_COMPCLASS X WHERE X.COMP = C.COMP ) AS GRCD , (SELECT NVL(MAX('Y'),'N') FROM TZ_COMPCLASS X ,TZ_TEMPLET Y WHERE X.COMP = C.COMP AND Y.GRCODE = X.GRCD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS GATEYN , (SELECT Y.DOMAIN FROM TZ_COMPCLASS X ,TZ_GRCODE Y WHERE X.COMP = C.COMP AND Y.GRCODE = X.GRCD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS DOMAIN , (SELECT Y.TYPE FROM TZ_COMPCLASS X ,TZ_TEMPLET Y WHERE X.COMP = C.COMP AND Y.GRCODE = X.GRCD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS TYPE , DECODE(C.COMP, '1001', 'K', 'G') AS GRCODE_KIND , SUBSTR(C.POSITION_CD,1,6) AS BONBU_CD , B.ORG_FULL_NM AS POSITION_NM , B.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , B.ORG_NM AS DEPT_NM , C.POST_NM AS POST_NM , C.LVL_NM AS LVL_NM , DECODE(C.LVL_NM, NULL, 'N', DECODE(C.COMP, '1001', DECODE(TRIM(C.LVL_NM), '직원', 'N', '', 'N', 'Y'), 'N')) AS MANAGER_FLAG , A.TITLE_NM AS TITLE_NM , (SELECT DECODE(C.COMP, '1001', 'kt', COMPNM) FROM TZ_COMPCLASS X WHERE X.COMP= C.COMP) AS COMP_NM , (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TZ_MANAGER ADM , TZ_GADMIN ROL WHERE ADM.USERID = A.USER_ID AND ADM.ISDELETED = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ADM.FMON AND ADM.TMON AND ROL.GADMIN = ADM.GADMIN ) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS ISADMIN , DECODE(C.SETUP_MPM, NULL, DECODE(C.COMP, '1001', '1', '5'), C.SETUP_MPM) AS SETUP_MPM , (SELECT X.NEW_JOB_CD FROM TN_JOB_MAPPING X WHERE X.JOB_CD = C.JOB_CD ) AS NEW_JOB_CD /* 직무 코드 */ , (SELECT X.JOB_NM FROM TN_JOB_MAPPING X WHERE X.JOB_CD = A.JOB_CD) AS NEW_JOB_NM /* 직무 정보 */ , (SELECT Z.GRCODE FROM TZ_GRCOMP Z WHERE Z.COMP = C.COMP AND Z.IS_NEW = 'Y' AND Z.GRCODE IN (SELECT GRCODE X FROM TZ_GRCODE X WHERE X.GRCODE_GUBUN = 'C' AND X.IS_NEW = 'Y' ) ) AS OFF_GRCODE , CASE WHEN C.ZORG_HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ZORGHEADYN , 'N'::varchar AS has_tutor_out , A.ORG_CD AS ORG_CD -- 조직코드 , NVL((SELECT 'Y'::VARCHAR FROM TZ_MANAGER X WHERE X.USERID = A.USER_ID AND ISDELETED = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1 ),'N') AS ADMR_YN -- 어드민여부 , 강사관련 메뉴 콘트롤 용 , B.ORG_FULL_NM AS ORG_FULL_NM -- 부서풀명 , CASE WHEN A.EMP_CLAS_CD = 'T' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_TEST , (SELECT NVL(MAX('Y'),'N') FROM TB_EXPERT_USER EXP WHERE EXP.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND EXP.EXPERT_USER_STS_CD = 'A' ) AS IS_EXPERT , FN_USER_CHK_MANAGER(A.USER_ID) AS MGR_YN -- 관리자 여부, 부서현황 메뉴 컨트롤 용 , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX('Y'), 'N') FROM TB_USER A, TB_ORG_CD B WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userid} AND B.ORG_CD = A.ORG_CD AND B.LEAF_YN = 'N' AND B.MGR_EMP_ID = A.USER_ID ) AS IS_EXECUTIVE FROM TB_USER A , TB_ORG_CD B , TZ_MEMBER C WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userid} AND B.ORG_CD = A.ORG_CD AND A.USER_ID = C.USERID
limit 100
SELECT A.USER_ID AS USERID , A.MPHONE_NO AS HANDPHONE , A.USER_NM AS NAME , A.EMAIL_ID AS EMAIL , B.COMP_CD AS COMP FROM TB_USER A, TB_ORG_CD B WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userid} AND B.ORG_CD = A.ORG_CD
SELECT A.USER_ID AS USERID , A.EMAIL_ID AS EMAIL , B.COMP_CD AS COMP FROM TB_USER A, TB_ORG_CD B WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userid} AND B.ORG_CD = A.ORG_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FRONT_LOGIN_LOG (LOG_SEQ, CRE_TM, USER_ID, IP_ADDR, MW_FLAG, LOGIN_PATH) VALUES (SQ_FRONT_MENU_LOG.NEXTVAL, NOW(), #{userid}, #{lgip}, #{con_device}, #{loginPath})
mapper.update: UPDATE TZ_MEMBER SET LGFAIL = LGFAIL + 1 WHERE LOWER(USERID) = LOWER(#{userid})
UPDATE TZ_MEMBER SET LGFAIL = 0 WHERE LOWER(USERID) = LOWER(#{s_userid})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND OPT = 'Y'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LSTDT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE ,'YYYYMMDD')
limit 100
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TN_LOGIN_FAIL_LOG ( SEQ, USERID, NAME, LGIP, LDATE ) VALUES ( TN_LOGIN_FAIL_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
#{p_userid}, (SELECT NAME FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{p_userid}),
#{userid}, (SELECT NAME FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{userid}),
#{lgip}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.TESTID AS USERID ,A.DEL_YN AS DELYN ,A.PW_YN AS PWYN ,B.PWD AS PWD ,B.NAME AS NAME ,B.COMP AS COMP FROM TN_TEST_MEMBER A ,TZ_MEMBER B WHERE A.TESTID = B.USERID AND A.TESTID = #{userid}
AND B.PWD = #{pwd}
mapper.update: UPDATE TN_TEST_MEMBER SET PW_YN = 'Y' WHERE TESTID = #{s_userid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (SELECT USERID, LG_IP FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND OPT = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LSTDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY LSTDT DESC LIMIT 1) WHERE SPLIT_PART(LG_IP, '.', 1) || SPLIT_PART(LG_IP, '.', 2) = SPLIT_PART(#{lgip}, '.', 1) || SPLIT_PART(#{lgip}, '.', 2)

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 4 AND SYSDATE < TO_DATE((SELECT STDT FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} ORDER BY STDT DESC LIMIT 1 ) , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + interval '5 minutes' AND MOD(COUNT (*) , 5) = 0 THEN 'F' ELSE 'S' END FROM TZ_SMSAUTH A WHERE TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUCCESS_CNT > 0 THEN ( SELECT TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SUCCESS_DT FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND OPT = 'Y' ORDER BY STDT DESC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE ( SELECT TO_DATE ( STDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS SUCCESS_DT FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND OPT = 'N' ORDER BY STDT LIMIT 1 ) END FROM ( SELECT count ( 1 ) AS SUCCESS_CNT FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND OPT = 'Y' ) ) AND USERID = #{userid}

/* getPopupInfo */ SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT SEC.FRONT_TITLE , TO_CHAR(SLT.STR_DT, 'D') , SEC.FRONT_SLOT_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SLT.DISP_ORD) REAL_DISP_ORD ,SLT.SLOT_ID , SLT.CRE_TM , SLT.BNNR_LINK_TYPE , SLT.SLOT_OBJ_ID , SLT.SLOT_IMG_LFILE_NM , SLT.SLOT_IMG_SFILE_NM , SLT.VIEW_CNT , TO_CHAR(SLT.STR_DT, 'YY.MM.DD') || '(' || SUBSTR('일월화수목금토', TO_CHAR(SLT.STR_DT, 'D'), 1) || ')' AS BNNR_STR_DT , TO_CHAR(SLT.END_DT, 'YY.MM.DD') || '(' || SUBSTR('일월화수목금토', TO_CHAR(SLT.END_DT, 'D'), 1) || ')' AS BNNR_END_DT , BNR.OVERLAY_TEXT , BNR.TEXT_COLOR , BNR.OVERLAY_TEXT_2 , BNR.TEXT_COLOR_2 , BNR.OVERLAY_TEXT_3 , BNR.TEXT_COLOR_3 FROM TB_SECT SEC , TB_SECT_SLOT SLT , TB_SECT_SLOT_TEXT BNR WHERE SEC.SECT_ID = 'POPUP.NOTI' AND SLT.SECT_ID = SEC.SECT_ID AND SLT.SLOT_STS_CD = 'A' AND TRUNC(NOW()) BETWEEN SLT.STR_DT AND SLT.END_DT AND BNR.SLOT_ID(+) = SLT.SLOT_ID) A WHERE A.REAL_DISP_ORD <= A.FRONT_SLOT_CNT ORDER BY A.REAL_DISP_ORD
SELECT COALESCE(MAX('Y'), 'N') FROM TB_ORG_CD WHERE P_ORG_CD = 'KTGRP' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND ORG_CD NOT IN ('2001') AND ORG_CD = #{comp}
SELECT ENV_VAL FROM TB_SYS_ENV WHERE ENV_ID = 'SMS_BYPASS'
mapper.insert:
WITH UPSERT AS ( UPDATE TB_USER_SESSION SET SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} , UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userid} RETURNING * )
INSERT INTO TB_USER_SESSION (USER_ID, SESSION_ID) SELECT #{userid}, #{sessionId} WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM UPSERT)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USER_DEV SET LOGIN_KEY = #{loginKey} , UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE DEV_ID = (SELECT LAST_DEV_ID FROM TB_USER_LOGIN WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
